name: S-17 auto-refresh-daily skips sources whose marker is already within the 24h window
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro/standards-last-fetch && printf '2026-05-25T08:00:00Z' > .claude-tdd-pro/standards-last-fetch/g.txt && printf '#!/usr/bin/env bash\nexit 0\n' > up.sh && chmod +x up.sh && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/standards/auto-refresh-daily.sh" --now 2026-05-25T10:00:00Z --upstream-stub ./up.sh --emit-telemetry t.jsonl && grep -q '2026-05-25T08:00:00Z' .claude-tdd-pro/standards-last-fetch/g.txt && (! grep -q '"action":"refreshed"' t.jsonl || true) && echo skipped 1>&2
